scope: issue-905 working-tree diff (MCP git tools + request_id audit correlation)

candidate_observations.title: Verbatim X-Request-ID adoption feeds audit correlation
candidate_observations.reason: Pre-existing middleware (SEC-001/#371); actor fields server-derived; hash chain intact; read filter admin-only. Caller can only mis-tag their own server-attributed row.

candidate_observations.title: CRLF response-splitting via reflected X-Request-ID
candidate_observations.reason: h11/uvicorn reject bare CR/LF in header values on parse and emit; not reachable.

access_control_verification.mcp_gate: checkAgentAccess enforces {self} U permitted for agent scope; user/system defer to backend

injection_checks.git_log_limit: int-typed at FastAPI boundary; structured query param to agent server; no shell interpolation
injection_checks.request_id_value: minted via randomUUID() in MCP tool

trend: first-run for this feature; no fingerprint match against prior reports
